---
pagetitle: "Research"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    grid:
      body-width: 1600px      # <--- Forces the central column to be huge
      sidebar-width: 0px      # Remove sidebar reservation
      margin-width: 0px       # Remove margin reservation
listing:
  - id: publications
    contents: research_files/journals.yml
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    image-align: left
    categories: false
    # Subtitle is used for your text date ("Q2 2026")
    fields: [image, title, subtitle, description] 
    
  - id: working-papers
    contents: research_files/working_papers.yml
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    image-align: left
    fields: [image, title, subtitle,  description]

  - id: policy-papers
    contents: research_files/policy.yml
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    image-align: left
    fields: [image, title, subtitle,  description]

    
---
::: {.panel-tabset}

## Publications

::: {#publications}
:::

## Working Papers

::: {#working-papers}
:::

## Policy & Other

::: {#policy-papers}
:::

:::
```{=html}
<script src="research-enhancements.js"></script>
```
